subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, through the sovereignty of His Will, hath created the Isráfíl of Utterance and commanded him to sound the Trumpet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق بسلطان ارادته اسرافیل البیان و امره ان ینفخ فی الصور و هو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
